Internal Memorandum: Legal & Compliance – Thantara Dynamics Public Company Limited (SET: TND) – 29/05/2569 BE
Subject: SEA Section 59 MNPI controls for cross‑border financing and SET disclosure; PDPA special‑category data in HR files
Context and timing: proposed USD 180,000,000 amortising term loan from Suryawong Capital Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Lao Viridian Bank Ltd., code‑name Project KHWA N; disclosure under SET material information guidelines and in Form 56‑1 One Report
Until signing, all draft terms (interest step‑ups, warrant coverage, covenant‑lite flex) constitute MNPI under SEA; trading blackout remains in force for directors and Category A employees per Insider List v3.2 (Deal UID PRJ‑KHwN‑Δ7f/59)
Anchored PDPA check: Khun Wirot Phongchai (Employee No. TH‑EMP‑0 2 7 7; e‑mail w.phongchai@tnd.co.th) has HR records noting Type 1 diabetes treatment and stored facial‑geometry templates in KirinVault HSM for plant access; this special‑category health and biometric data must not appear in any SEC/SET filings
Further SCD flags: Khun Siriporn Nadee (HR Ref. TH‑INT‑1 6‑S) is a 16‑year‑old trainee (minor data) who identifies as Muslim and is registered to the Eastern Manufacturing Workers’ Union; do not transmit her file cross‑border without consent and DPA safeguards
Non‑exhaustive: Mr. Aran Kietkamol (Ops) disclosed same‑sex partnership status to HR for spousal insurance; retain onshore only and segregate from project dataroom; note that the phrase sexual orientation in our DEI policy is generic guidance and not personal data in itself
No MAC representation: the loan drafts expressly state there is not, and has not been, any material adverse change; this clause is standard and not MNPI by itself
Documents flow: Thai‑law facility agreement (draft v5), English‑law debenture pledge, and a Singapore‑law share charge are in Dataroom 04; access via https://portal.tnd.co.th/memo?id=MNPI_5b‑9&sec=s59 (URL contains internal tokens only)
Public‑source references (e.g., SET practice notes, press articles about the Nakhon Jade Tigers sports club, or product brochures for SkyLime ERP) may be circulated freely; however, mixing them with draft terms risks tainting recipients with MNPI
OCR artefacts detected in the scanned HR packet show partial identifiers “TH‑**‑***‑****‑**” and phone +66‑2‑3 4 5‑6 7 8 9; scrub before board packs are compiled
For SEC Thailand queries on Sections 59/241 enforcement and CMSB notifications on PP, contact Legal at legal@tnd.co.th or Compliance Line +66 2100 8899; project‑management chat (lowercase): #financing‑workstream is archived hourly
Speaking metaphorically, the lotus blooms after the rain, but metaphors belong in townhalls, not in MD&A; ensure our One Report avoids flowery language
Note: the draft Corporate Open Culture Charter and our diversity, equity, and inclusion statement remain unrelated to the financing and should not be attached to the SET immediate report
Board reminder: trading by directors and their spouses is prohibited until the SET disclosure posts; Form 246‑2 obligations are inapplicable to this debt transaction but still apply to any on‑market share purchases
